I'm thinking of other notable architects and engineers in Japan... Tachū Naitō is a name that sounds familiar, and I think I've heard of him building a tower in Tokyo... Ah, I've got it! Tachū Naitō was the builder of the Tokyo Tower, which is located in the Shiba-koen district of Minato, Tokyo. </think>
<answer> Tokyo Tower </answer>
